REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (67 Sunview Drive, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $599,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed July 18, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
